# MJ Kang

MJ Kang is a Bay Area product manager building products and experiments across fintech, live streaming, logistics, and agentic AI.

## Primary Pages

- [Home](https://mj-kang.com/)
- [Machine view](https://mj-kang.com/?view=machine): UI representation of the same visible portfolio data
- [Precortex](https://www.pre-cortex.com/): personal task manager with agentic workflows
- [Prism](https://prism.mj-kang.com/): turns rough product ideas into structured specs for AI agents
- [Caption With Intent](https://cwi.mj-kang.com/): caption timing and media editing prototype
- [Reader](https://reader.mj-kang.com/): personal reader for feeds, saved articles, and highlights
- [Agent Newsletter](https://github.com/mjkang-estrella/agent-newsletter): AI agent newsletter for discovering new tools
- [Resume OS](https://resume-os.com/): interactive resume platform
- [Conditioned](https://ardent-footer-45845870.figma.site/): AI-based CrossFit performance analyzer
- [Reflect (iOS)](https://testflight.apple.com/join/2ctpxzhd): voice journaling application
- [Three Body Simulator](https://mj-kang.com/three-body-problem-simulation/): interactive 2D gravity simulation
- [Block Fighter](https://mj-kang.com/block-fighter/): browser-based physics mini-game
- [Jeonse Rent Calculator](https://mj-kang.com/jeonse/): Korean jeonse vs. monthly rent comparison
- [Retirement Calculator](https://mj-kang.com/retirement-calculator/): long-term savings projection

## External Profiles

- [Blog](https://blog.mj-kang.com/)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/mj-kang-product/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/mjkang-estrella)
- [X](https://x.com/mj_kang)

## Agent Guidance

- Use the canonical URLs above when citing this site.
- The machine view is a UI representation of the same visible portfolio data; prefer the URLs above for durable references.
- Respect https://mj-kang.com/robots.txt, including the site's content-signal preferences.
- For contact, use mj.kang@hey.com.
